{
  "concepts": [
    {"text": "Oak Ridge", "rationale": "location of the facility mentioned"},
    {"text": "Tennessee", "rationale": "state containing the facility"},
    {"text": "Fort Knox", "rationale": "metaphor used to describe the facility's security"},
    {"text": "uranium", "rationale": "material referenced in the facility comparison"},
    {"text": "perimeter fence", "rationale": "security barrier mentioned in intrusion description"},
    {"text": "security cameras", "rationale": "security equipment mentioned"},
    {"text": "activists", "rationale": "group who carried out the 2012 intrusion"},
    {"text": "2012", "rationale": "year of the intrusion event"},
    {"text": "hymns", "rationale": "religious songs the intruders sang"},
    {"text": "anti-war slogans", "rationale": "graffiti content left by intruders"},
    {"text": "blood", "rationale": "material splashed during the intrusion"},
    {"text": "National Nuclear Security Administration", "rationale": "government agency referenced regarding firings"},
    {"text": "Obama", "rationale": "person (President) briefed on the incident"},
    {"text": "GAO", "rationale": "agency that conducted security tests"},
    {"text": "TSA", "rationale": "Transportation Security Administration referenced"},
    {"text": "airport security", "rationale": "security domain tested by the GAO"},
    {"text": "IED", "rationale": "abbreviation for improvised explosive device used in tests"},
    {"text": "carry-on luggage", "rationale": "type of luggage used to hide test items"},
    {"text": "syringe", "rationale": "item carried in a test through checkpoints"},
    {"text": "watch", "rationale": "item described with an electric fuse used as a detonator"},
    {"text": "electric fuse", "rationale": "component described inside a watch used as a detonator"},
    {"text": "detonator", "rationale": "device role attributed to the watch/fuse"},
    {"text": "behavior detection officers", "rationale": "TSA personnel role referenced in defense of screening"},
    {"text": "DHS", "rationale": "Department of Homeland Security referenced"},
    {"text": "fliers", "rationale": "labeled items planted by DHS testers"},
    {"text": "USB drives", "rationale": "media planted in parking lots during tests"},
    {"text": "CDs", "rationale": "media planted in parking lots during tests"},
    {"text": "2014", "rationale": "year appearing in a planted item label (\"2014 Budget\")"},
    {"text": "DoD", "rationale": "Department of Defense referenced regarding USB tests"},
    {"text": "air-gapped", "rationale": "description of military computers' network isolation"},
    {"text": "Los Alamos", "rationale": "national laboratory targeted in a GAO drone test"},
    {"text": "New Mexico", "rationale": "state containing the Los Alamos facility"},
    {"text": "drone", "rationale": "unmanned aerial vehicle used in tests"},
    {"text": "Styrofoam", "rationale": "material the GAO's test drone was made of"},
    {"text": "plutonium", "rationale": "nuclear material simulated by dummy payloads"},
    {"text": "Houston", "rationale": "city referenced in the Port of Houston drone test"},
    {"text": "Texas", "rationale": "state containing the Port of Houston"},
    {"text": "small boat", "rationale": "launch platform used in a Port of Houston test"},
    {"text": "The Guardian", "rationale": "news outlet credited for a photo"},
    {"text": "DonkeyHotey", "rationale": "photo credit name"},
    {"text": "Scott Beale", "rationale": "photo credit name"},
    {"text": "White House", "rationale": "institution that held a 2013 hackathon"},
    {"text": "2013", "rationale": "year of the White House hackathon"},
    {"text": "2011", "rationale": "year referenced for a DoD USB test"},
    {"text": "2015", "rationale": "year of the GAO drone test"},
    {"text": "US-CERT", "rationale": "computer emergency team referenced"}
  ]
}
